summary: Frontend-only testing of FranchCamp presentation app. Tested /franchcamp route (9 slides) and verified / route (Rostelecom, 14 slides) still works. All 17 tests passed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: FranchCamp presentation at /franchcamp has 9 slides with proper navigation (arrows, dots, keyboard). All data-testid attributes are in place: fc-title, fc-context-title, fc-value-title, fc-value-card-{0-3}, fc-blocks-title, fc-block-{0-2}, fc-noteall-title, fc-echomind-title, fc-emergent-title, fc-emergent-card-{0-3}, fc-offer-title, fc-offer-{0-2}, fc-final-title, fc-next-btn, fc-prev-btn, fc-pdf-btn, fc-dot-{0-8}. Rostelecom presentation at / has 14 slides with similar navigation structure.

franchcamp_presentation.slide_1_title: PASSED - Title shows 'ИИ как часть пакета для франчайзи'
franchcamp_presentation.progress_dots: PASSED - All 9 dots found (fc-dot-0 to fc-dot-8)
